lessons.text: See clearly, and illusion loses its grip.
Share what moves you; it wakes others up.
Show up with love, and clarity follows.
Let understanding burn away your confusion.
The best of anything is a glimpse of something larger.
Trust that a single fragment of the divine upholds the whole world.
lessons.note: Pure cosmic-support metaphysics; no universal daily-wisdom kernel.

lessons.text: Meet what overwhelms you with humility, not fear.
Do your part; the outcome isn't yours to control.
Face your fight with courage, not dread.
Honor what you've been taking for granted.
Wholehearted attention reveals what routine can't.
Work without clinging, and hold no one as enemy.
The concrete is easier to hold than the abstract.
The abstract road is valid, just steeper to walk.
Give yourself fully, and you'll be carried through.
Start by giving it your full attention.
If focus fails, keep showing up.
Can't stay steady? Act on it anyway.
At minimum, let go of needing a reward.
Release the outcome and peace arrives at once.
Wish no one harm; be a friend to all.
Stay steady through highs and lows; forgive quickly.
Stay content and steady, your resolve firm.
Trouble no one, and let nothing trouble you.
Want less, stay clear, drop the anxious scheming.
Stop clinging and recoiling; let things be.
Treat friend and foe, honor and insult, alike.
Let praise and blame pass through you.
Follow through with faith, all in.
